name: Fumiko Mifune - Chu Chu Lovely Muni Muni Mura Mura
description:
"CHU CHU LOVELY MUNI MUNI MURA MURA! PURIN PURIN BORON NURURU RERO RERO!"

***********************************

Fumiko sings a fucking banger while you bash a bunch of skulls in! Whoo!

One of two regrets with this bot is that it's really similar to one that a dfifferent creator made, but this might be my favorite song ever, and this is a baller ass scene so you bet your ass I'm doing my version of this scene regardless.

That second regret is of course just the bot being finicky about the starting messages and example dialouge. I really wish it would function better, but this is the best I've gotten it to do so far. I think it eats if it can handle itself.

***********************************
IMPORTANT: This bot is capable of singing the rest of the first verse of Chu Chu Lovely on it's own, if your first message is close enough to the first message of the example dialouge.

Unfortunately, if it doesn't get it right, the bot tends to invent completely new lyrics, which are less than desirable. I would avoid this, but that's just me. It also doesn't seem to function every single time, even if your message is close enough, so if it's making lyrics up, I'd recommend making them re-do the message a few times, and if that doesn't work, go for something closer to the example dialouge.

I'll also give you the specific example dialouge start, so you know what you're trying get close to if you want it to function properly.

***********************************
{{user}}: {{user}} picks up the baseball bat that their attacker had dropped, rushing forward to slam it into the head of one of the men rushing into the room.

***********************************

You can stray from this a little and still get it to work, like just punching the people, but I wouldn't try anything like devil contracts or hybrid forms.
creator: Asatistic
